mapper.sql: id, created_time, created_by, updated_time, updated_by, batch_no, serial_no, title, work_order_no, contact_phone, appeal_phone, appeal_content, reply_content, appeal_type, satisfaction, unsatisfied_reason, online_supervision_no, supervision_return_time, supervision_finish_time, supervision_reply_content, supervision_sms_satisfaction, supervision_return_content, judgment_level1, judgment_level2, process_result, is_final, plan_finish_time, category_adjust, undertaker_unit, final_result, created_org_id, comment_leader_id

t3.id, t3.created_time, t3.created_by, t3.updated_time, t3.updated_by, t3.batch_no, t3.title, t3.work_order_no, t3.contact_phone, t3.appeal_phone, t3.appeal_content, t3.reply_content, t3.appeal_type, t3.satisfaction, t3.unsatisfied_reason, t3.online_supervision_no, t3.supervision_return_time, t3.supervision_finish_time, t3.supervision_reply_content, t3.supervision_sms_satisfaction, t3.supervision_return_content, t3.judgment_level1, t3.judgment_level2, t3.process_result, t3.is_final, t3.plan_finish_time, t3.category_adjust, t3.undertaker_unit, t3.final_result, t3.created_org_id, t3.order_category_id, t3.order_category_name, t3.allow_back, t3.allow_back_time, t3.allow_comment, t3.settle_condition, t3.comment_leader_id
mapper.select:
select
FROM chief_work_order_item t3 ${ew.sqlSegment} and t3.id in ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE
t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0'
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{model.coOrccId}, t2.co_unit_ids)
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{model.coOrccId}, t2.cc_unit_ids)
t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = #{model.roleCode} ) AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{model.leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0'
)

SELECT
FROM chief_work_order_item t3 where t3.id in ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{model.displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' )
AND t3.id IN
#{item}

SELECT count(*) FROM chief_work_order_item t3
t3.id in( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status in ('办结', '已退回') AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' )
AND t3.id IN
#{item}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM chief_work_order_item t3 where t3.id in ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = #{displayStatus} AND t1.role_code = #{roleCode} ) AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' )

SELECT subString_index(t3.order_category_name, '-', 1 ) AS categoryName, COUNT(1) AS total FROM chief_work_order_item t3 RIGHT JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE 1 = 1 AND t2.lead_unit_id = #{leadUnitId} and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) t4 ON t3.work_order_no = t4.task_order_no where t3.order_category_name is not null GROUP BY subString_index(t3.order_category_name, '-', 1)

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM chief_work_order_item t3 where t3.id in( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no as task_order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.current_node_code IN ( SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '处办中' AND t1.role_code = '1' ) and t2.valid = '1' and t2.level = '0' ) and t3.order_category_name is null

SELECT t1.`name`, IFNULL(finish_stat.finishCount, 0) AS finishCount, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY IFNULL(finish_stat.finishCount, 0) DESC) AS finishRanking FROM `base_org` t1 LEFT JOIN ( SELECT t1.id, t1.name, COUNT(t2.id) AS finishCount FROM `base_org` t1 LEFT JOIN normal_work_order_task t2 ON t1.id = t2.lead_unit_id AND t2.current_node_code = '13.1' AND t2.valid = '1' AND DATE_FORMAT(t2.created_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') WHERE t1.parent_id <> 0 GROUP BY t1.id, t1.name ) finish_stat ON t1.id = finish_stat.id WHERE t1.parent_id <> 0 ORDER BY finishRanking;

SELECT t5.* FROM ( SELECT t3.*, "已退回" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '已退回' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "办结" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '办结' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "结案待审" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '结案待审' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "下派跟踪" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '下派跟踪' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "下级已退回" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '下级已退回' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "处办中" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '处办中' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) )
UNION ALL
SELECT t3.*, "待签收" AS status FROM chief_work_order_item t3 WHERE t3.id IN ( SELECT DISTINCT t2.order_no FROM normal_work_order_task t2 WHERE t2.valid = '1'
AND t2.lead_unit_id IN
#{id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM normal_work_order_task sub_t2 WHERE sub_t2.order_no = t2.order_no AND sub_t2.valid = '1' AND sub_t2.LEVEL = '0' AND sub_t2.current_node_code IN (SELECT t1.node_code FROM role_status_mapping t1 WHERE t1.display_status = '待签收' AND t1.role_code = '1') ) ) ) t5
${ew.sqlSegment}
AND (
t5.order_no LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%')
)
AND t5.order_category_id = #{model.orderCategoryId}
AND DATE_FORMAT(t5.region_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{model.regionDeadlineStart}, '%Y-%m-%d')
AND DATE_FORMAT(t5.region_deadline, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{model.regionDeadlineEnd}, '%Y-%m-%d')
